questionHtml: The Ghost of Jupiter is a nebula.
markschemeHtml:
cloud/body of dust and gas ✓

 

Award [1] for a reference to dust OR gas.

Ignore further references to origin of cloud.

meta.title: The Ghost of Jupiter is a nebula. Outline what is meant by a nebula. Astrophysicists have deduced the nature of this nebula from Earth. Outline how they can make these deductions.
